working_on: Routine task AUDIT-MIN (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Philosophy of mind subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35%-density edge sample (k=25 of N=70) plus an edge-anchored node sample (~12 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/mind.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/mind.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 25-edge sample (k=25 of N=70 within-mind edges from 0040_seed_mind_part1.sql + 0046_seed_mind_part1.sql; 35.7% density per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" AUDIT-MIN row) plus the ~12-node edge-anchored sample — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0110.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md). Parametric-only review; empirical-fortification branch prohibited for routine sessions until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout. phase: NA-routine

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-MIN fully delivered: 25-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review landed in mind.md (330 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-12, E-14, E-17, E-23, N-2) get fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0110 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-MIN landed a 25-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/mind.md (330 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 21 sound (84%), 2 defensible (E-12 supervenience_mental→mental_causation — tools-vs-topic ordering, defensible on the Kim framing where supervenience is the load-bearing premise of the exclusion-argument formulation of mental causation; E-23 consciousness→phenomenology — school/movement-as-target, the relation type is plausibly historical_influence per the reserved-but-unused predicate or a methodological-tradition relation rather than pedagogical_prerequisite), 2 reversed-medium-confidence (E-14 hard_problem_of_consciousness→explanatory_gap — Levine 1983 explanatory gap precedes Chalmers 1995 hard problem; the migration's edge inverts the canonical conceptual-dependency direction since Levine's gap is the more general/prior concept and Chalmers's hard problem is its more elaborated, specific successor; E-17 property_dualism→knowledge_argument — the canonical SEP framing presents the knowledge argument as motivating property dualism not the other way around; same migration also has property_dualism→philosophical_zombie not in this sample which is the analogous instance for the zombie argument). Node-verdict tally: 10 sound, 1 granularity-mismatch high-confidence (N-2 phenomenology — school/movement granularity, FIRST instance of the per-node prompt template's school-name flag in the audit; the template explicitly names 'Vienna Circle, Scholasticism' as examples and phenomenology is a closer parallel to those than any node previously surfaced; distinct in kind from the sub-discipline-label-with-content pattern S-0105 N-8 + S-0108 N-4 + N-9 + S-0109 N-4 + N-6). Substantive defects: 4 of 37 sampled elements (10.8%) — between S-0105 epistemology's 5.4% and S-0108 ethics's 16.7%, well below S-0104 cross-bridge baseline 35.2% and consistent with the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges run cleaner than cross-domain bridges. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was nowhere near firing — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-12) was 1/12 = 8.3% (E-12 defensible; E-14 reversed and E-17 reversed both fall in the second half); standard 35% density held. Four load-bearing aggregate patterns surfaced for the closeout disposition: (1) school/movement granularity pattern surfaces (N-2 phenomenology — first instance in the audit so far of the per-node prompt template's school-name flag; cross-check candidates not in this sample include vienna_circle_logical_positivism, scholasticism, aristotelian_four_causes, greek_atomism); (2) argument-vs-position directionality pattern surfaces in two distinct edges in the same sample (E-14 hard_problem→explanatory_gap; E-17 property_dualism→knowledge_argument; same migration also has property_dualism→philosophical_zombie not in this sample) — first subdomain audit to surface this in two distinct edges, suggests systematic mind-seed directionality issue around argument-supports-position vs position-supplies-context-for-argument; (3) tools-vs-topic ordering pattern (E-12 supervenience_mental→mental_causation — distinct shape from the prior frameworks-vs-foundations dialectical-ordering pattern S-0105 E-2 + S-0108 E-5 + S-0109 E-3 but in the same directionality cluster; the inverse dependency direction — tool supplied as prereq for topic, vs the prior pattern's sub-position back to a more general topic); (4) position-family-name pattern in two nodes in the same sample (N-1 physicalism + N-12 dualism — same class as S-0109 N-3 a_theory_of_time; both name position-families with coherent shared cores and named sub-variants in the graph as separate nodes; distinct from sub-discipline-label-with-content S-0109 N-4 modality + N-6 mereology and from school/movement N-2 phenomenology). Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 70 within-mind edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again — fifth session in a row). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104's cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary candidate were not extended (within-mind data did not corroborate the cross-bridge-specific pattern). The argument-vs-position directionality pattern (observation #2) is on track to qualify as a new gate-feasible class via aggregate scan at closeout — could be operationalized as a validator soft-warn that flags pedagogical_prerequisite edges from a node tagged as a 'position' to a node tagged as an 'argument' (the schema would need position/argument sub-class tagging, parallel to the proposed history-terminator sub-class tagging in master-plan proposal #4). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-12, E-14, E-17, E-23, N-2) get fortified at the closeout per the master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" fortification scope. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0109 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-MIN criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-LOG (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; logic subdomain, 12 of 34 edges at 35% density). 6 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
